name: Sarah M.
quote: Frankie Says has completely ruined other cafes for me. The eggs benny on sourdough is absolutely divine, and the coffee is consistently the best I've had in Abbotsford.

name: James T.
quote: We came for brunch and ended up booking dinner the same day. The seasonal menu changes keep things exciting — every visit feels like a new experience.

name: Priya K.
quote: The Thursday night dinners are a ritual for our friend group. Incredible atmosphere, attentive staff, and cocktails that pair perfectly with the food.

name: Michael B.
quote: A hidden gem in Abbotsford. The chefs really know how to balance flavours. The shakshuka is a weekend must-order for me.

name: Emma R.
quote: Booked a table for my partner's birthday and the team made it so special. The food presentation was stunning and the service was warm and personal.
